title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at PayU

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at PayU
jsonLd.description:
We at PayU are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PayU:
PayU is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU!
